title: Prism Bloom Exercise Event DB
subtitle: Prism Bloom Exercise event database stored in Google Sheets.
description: PBE Event DB is the Prism Bloom Exercise event database used to store event-related records in Google Sheets.
A connected Google app manages the database, while other applications and automations read the data for event creation, scheduling, and display workflows.
features: Central event database for Prism Bloom Exercise
Google Sheets storage for easy access and editing
Google app management interface for maintaining event data
Data source for event automations, calendars, posts, and other tools
statusDetails: Database is being used as a structured event data source
Google Sheets is the main storage system
Google app management tools support updates and organization
Additional apps and automations can read the database as needed

screenshots.title: Event Database
screenshots.body: Google Sheets view for Prism Bloom Exercise event records

screenshots.title: Event Manager
screenshots.body: Google app used to manage PBE event data

howItWorks: Prism Bloom Exercise event records are stored in a Google Sheets database.
The Google app is used to manage, update, and organize the event records.
Other applications and automations read from the database to support event planning, calendar workflows, and social/event posting tools.
setupInstall: Create or connect the Prism Bloom Exercise event Google Sheet.
Connect the Google app management layer to the event sheet.
Allow approved apps and automations to read the event data.
apiStructure: Storage layer: Google Sheets event records.
Management layer: Google app for editing and maintaining the database.
Consumer layer: event tools, automations, and applications that read event data.

progressNotes: Core schema and record system implementation
